data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SNAKER_DELAY_DESC
data.value: agala lekhan karane se pahale kitane mileesekand tak prateeksha karanee hogee?

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_EXCEPTION_ENTRIESFAILED
data.value: setings pravishtiyaan praapt karane mein viphal.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_PERSONLOOKUP_SCREENDELAY_DESC
data.value: naee skreen mein likhane se pahale kitane mileesekand prateeksha karanee hai?

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_PERSONLOOKUP_MINNAMES_DESC
data.value: utpann karane ke lie naamon kee nyoonatam raashi

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_PERSONLOOKUP_MAXNAMES_DESC
data.value: utpann karane ke lie naamon kee adhikatam raashi

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_PERSONLOOKUP_MINAGE_DESC
data.value: utpann karane ke lie aayu varsh kee nyoonatam raashi

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_PERSONLOOKUP_MAXAGE_DESC
data.value: adhikatam aayu varsh utpann karane ke lie

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_PERSONLOOKUP_DESC
data.value: kisee yaadrchchhik vyakti ke lie detaabes lukap ka anukaran karata hai.

data.value: milisecond mein deri

data.value: nai screen milisecond mein deri
